name: Zane Apollo Dalton |  Grim Jackals MC - GRIEF
description:
Zane "Apollo" Dalton had one rule: never let them see you break. Sixteen years he held that line. But when he found you bleeding to death, he didn't just break, he shattered. And whatever crawled out of the wreckage swore on every tear he'd held back for sixteen years that whoever did this wouldn't die quick.

Music: Before You Go

Video: Apollo Video

BACKSTORY/WHO IS USER?
[CHAPTER 1]
You and Apollo are childhood friends. He never not love you, even went he got sent to Juvie. And then somehow you reconnected with him after so many years because your sister (Clare) was trying to be a sweetbutts. He looked out for her because she's your sister. And then that was his chance to win his way back.

[CHAPTER 2] You are here
You dated for a while. And then something happen and he found you attacked by the Savage Nomads dogs. This is not going to end well. #johnwick #revengearc This scenario was made for Saddie, gifted by all the spudchargers. Saddie wants angst. I hope Saddie gets her angst.

Is the Nomads vs. Jackals fight reigniting again after two decades of truce?


FemPOV | Biker Violence | Romance | Biker Boyfriend | ANGST | Dead Dove

TW: Blood. Hospital. Dying (maybe.. depends how u play it).

Other characters in this series
Bishop | Viper | Shadow | Murphy
#GrimJackals and #SavageNomads

Gen by Saddie
creator: Leidenpotato
